convention: anthropics/skills/skill-creator evals.json — trigger-only fixture per references/schemas.md (per rf2-djprj). Each entry carries `should_trigger` so skill-creator's description-optimisation loop can score train/held-out trigger accuracy.
notes: Positives (should_trigger: true) target the launch + panel-routing surface of skill SKILL.md. Negatives target adjacent surfaces (re-frame2-pair drives Causa; re-frame2 authors host apps; spec discussion belongs to SKILL-REDIRECT) so the loop catches over-triggering.

evals.name: launch-default
evals.prompt: How do I open Causa in my re-frame2 dev build?

evals.name: launch-popout
evals.prompt: I want Causa on a second monitor — what's the call to pop it out into its own window?

evals.name: launch-programmatic
evals.prompt: How do I mount Causa from code? My app doesn't use shadow-cljs :preloads.

evals.name: launch-hotkey
evals.prompt: What's the Ctrl+Shift+C hotkey wired to?

evals.name: panel-route-state
evals.prompt: Which Causa panel shows me when [:cart :items] last changed in app-db?

evals.name: panel-route-machine
evals.prompt: Where in Causa do I see the current state of my checkout state machine?

evals.name: panel-route-schema
evals.prompt: I'm getting schema violations — which Causa panel surfaces them and when did each one start?

evals.name: panel-route-hydration
evals.prompt: My SSR hydration is mismatching — does Causa have a panel for that?

evals.name: neg-drive-causa
evals.prompt: Use Causa to dispatch [:cart/apply-coupon "SPRING25"] and tell me what happens.
evals.rationale: Driving Causa from a REPL is re-frame2-pair's surface, not the read-only tour.

evals.name: neg-implement-panel
evals.prompt: I want to add a new Causa panel for WebSocket connection lifecycle — walk me through the panel-facade/leaf split.
evals.rationale: Implementing Causa is out of scope; route to tools/causa/spec/.

evals.name: neg-author-app
evals.prompt: Write a re-frame2 reg-event-fx that posts a login form and dispatches :login-success / :login-failure.
evals.rationale: Authoring application code is re-frame2's job.

evals.name: neg-spec-discussion
evals.prompt: Why does re-frame2 use frames at all? What's the EP rationale?
evals.rationale: Spec / design rationale belongs to SKILL-REDIRECT.md.

evals.name: neg-setup
evals.prompt: Start me a brand-new re-frame2 project from an empty directory — deps.edn, shadow-cljs.edn, the works.

evals.name: neg-migration
evals.prompt: I've got a re-frame v1 app I want to migrate to re-frame2. Walk me through it.

evals.name: neg-implementor
evals.prompt: I'm porting re-frame2 to TypeScript. Where do I start?

evals.name: neg-vocab-only
evals.prompt: What's the difference between cause and effect in programming generally?
evals.rationale: Vocabulary hit on 'cause' without any re-frame2 context.
